description: Lock the 2026-06-27 trapping correction to constructed animal traps anchored by early-Holocene desert-kite evidence rather than a generic Ancient placeholder or unrelated fish-trap scope.

checks.reason: The node now uses the approximate 10 ka Jordanian desert-kite dating anchor converted to a BCE millennium-level graph date.
Animal movement and sign knowledge helps place and use traps, but it is not a universal material dependency for every trap form.
Woodworking is retained as broad antecedent craft context for deadfalls and other wooden traps, not as the direct desert-kite construction requirement.
Cordage is retained as broad antecedent craft context for snares, not as the direct desert-kite construction requirement.
